dct_title_s: [Series of maps from Fuller's A Pisgah-sight of Palestine and the confines thereof]
dct_alternative_sm: A Pisgah-sight of Palestine and the confines thereof : with the history of the Old and New Testament acted thereon
dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Bar scale on map given in "Scala miliarium".
Iluustrations of coats of arms, cherubs, settlements and structures, ships, people, and Biblical events throughout.
Each map has descriptive text throughout, decorative cartouches, and seals.
Shows topography, vegetation, drainage, travel routes, places of historical interest.
Appears in Fuller's A Pisgah-sight of Palestine and the confines thereof, with the history of the Old and New Testament acted thereon.

[1] Reuben : aquarum instar ruens ne excessas / W. Marshall scupsit. -- [2] Gad : turma populabitur cum, sed ipse populabitur alios tandem / Guilel: Marshall sculpsit, ano. 1648 -- [3] Manasseh : ramus faecundus, ramus faecundus juxta fontem / Ro: Vaughan sculp: -- [4] Napthali : est cerva emissa quae profert verba elegantia / Tho : Cross sculpt: -- [5] Assher : pinguis panis ejus et prebebit delicias regibus -- [6] Zebulon : ad portum marium ipse ad portū marium habitabit / Ro: Vaughan sculp. -- [7] Issachar : asinus fortis decūbens inter duo onena -- [8] Manasseh : ramus faecundus, ramus faecundus juxta fontem / John Goddard Sculp -- [9] Ephraim : vitula est edocta, amans triturare / Ro: Vaughan sculp: -- [10] Benjamin : lupus qui discerpit, mane comedit praedam, et ad vesperā dividit spolium / Ro: Vaughan sculp: spud Waltham 1649 — [11] Dan : serpens juxta viam qui calces equi mordet, et decidit sessor ejus retrorsum / Ro: Vaughan Sculp: -- [12] Simeon : instrumenta violentia in habitationibus ipsius / Tho: Cross sculp: -- [13] Juda : accubuit ut leo, quis fuscitabit eum / John Goddard sculp -- [14] Terra Moriath sive solymarum : ager suburbanus / Guil: Marshall Sculp: -- [15] Jerusalem : qualis (vt plurimum) extitit aetate Solomonis -- [16] Templum Solomonis -- [17] Atria Templi Solomonis -- [18] Libanus et ejus vicinia -- [19] Icon Tabernaculi ex aria montano desumpta -- [20] [Position of tribes around the Tabernacle] -- [21] Aegyptus antiqua / Ro: Vaughan Sculp: -- [22] [Regions and cities around the plains of Moab] -- [23] [Twelve tribes of Israel surrounding the Temple].
